/Objects/

# IDE Configuration
.vscode/

*.swp

*.user

*.bak

# Compiler-generated files
*.b

# CMake build directory

*.cmake

# Python cache
__pycache__/
*.py[cod]
*$py.class

# Dependencies
/Drivers/
/Middlewares/

# 但保留自己写的代码文件
!/Core/
!/LCDku/
!*.c
!*.h

# STM32CubeMX generated files (可选，如果想保留则注释掉)

# OS specific

*.swp
